description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a rectangular display framed by a thin, matte black bezel. The front face is dominated by the screen, which appears slightly reflective and is bordered by a uniform, narrow bezel. The monitor is supported by a wide, flat rectangular base connected to a short, sturdy neck, providing stability. The rear panel is plain and featureless, with no visible buttons, ports, or branding. The side views reveal the monitor's slim profile, with the screen and bezel forming a single, continuous surface. The overall design is minimalist and modern, suitable for office or home environments.
description: A slim, rectangular computer monitor with a matte black bezel and a flat, wide base. The design is minimalist, with no visible buttons, ports, or logos.
description_view_0: The rear view shows a plain, flat black panel with no visible features or markings.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the monitor's slim profile and the flat, rectangular base.
description_view_2: The front view displays the screen area, framed by a thin, matte black bezel and supported by a wide base.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the monitor's thinness and the shape of the base.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, matte black, and uniform in thickness on all sides, with sharp corners and no decorative elements or color contrast.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a flat, rectangular pedestal base with a short, solid neck, all in matte black plastic with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
